_description: MCSB control to Azure built-in Policy mapping. Source: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark built-in initiative (1f3afdf9-d0c9-4c3d-847f-89da613e70a8). Custom policies from the policies TF repo should be added under custom_policies with mcsb_controls metadata.
_refresh: Scheduled weekly via GitHub Action (see .github/workflows/refresh-policy-mapping.yml — PRPRO-0003)

builtin_policies.display_name: Storage account public access should be disallowed
builtin_policies.defender_recommendation: Storage accounts should restrict public access

builtin_policies.display_name: Secure transfer to storage accounts should be enabled
builtin_policies.defender_recommendation: Secure transfer to storage accounts should be enabled

builtin_policies.display_name: Storage accounts should have the minimum TLS version of TLS1_2
builtin_policies.defender_recommendation: Storage accounts should have infrastructure encryption

builtin_policies.display_name: Storage accounts should have infrastructure encryption
Storage accounts should restrict network access
builtin_policies.defender_recommendation: Storage accounts should restrict network access using virtual network rules

builtin_policies.display_name: Storage accounts should disable public network access
builtin_policies.defender_recommendation: Storage accounts should disable public network access

builtin_policies.display_name: Storage accounts should have resource logs enabled
builtin_policies.defender_recommendation: Resource logs in Storage Accounts should be enabled

builtin_policies.display_name: Storage accounts should prevent shared key access
builtin_policies.defender_recommendation: Storage accounts should prevent shared key access

builtin_policies.display_name: Storage accounts should prevent cross tenant object replication

_notes.custom_policy_integration: To link custom policies from the policies TF repo, add entries to custom_policies array with: {id, display_name, mcsb_controls}. The policies TF resource should include metadata.mcsb_controls to enable automated extraction.
coverage_gaps: ST-005 (CMK) has no direct built-in audit policy for storage; enforced via Defender for Cloud recommendation 'Storage accounts should use customer-managed key for encryption'
ST-009 (soft delete) and ST-010 (versioning) are not covered by MCSB built-in initiative policies; rely on Checkov rules CKV_AZURE_111 and CKV_AZURE_119
